overview.introduction: Roles organize tasks, variables, templates, handlers, and files into standard directory structures to make automation clean and reusable.
overview.why_it_matters: Understanding Roles allows developers to deploy environments reliably at high speed.
overview.industry_usage: Used by system administrators and platform engineering teams globally.
overview.what_you_will_build: An isolated sandbox folder deploying yaml playbooks and targets configs.
overview.prerequisites: Git course and Linux terminal fundamentals.
learning_outcomes: Explain the main concepts of Roles.
Structure inventories, playbooks, templates, and roles.
Incorporate variables, tags, handlers, and conditionals logic.
Deploy and check state values on target nodes.
Adopt clean IT infrastructure provisioning workflows.

key_concepts.title: Modular Configurations Packaging
key_concepts.definition: Dividing complex playbook settings into clean folder pathways to allow consistent task sourcing.
why_important: Saves manual server setup configuration time.
key_concepts.explanation: Detailed context regarding Roles. Structuring configurations as code blocks improves change transparency.

commands.name: mkdir
commands.output_explanation: Confirms action step for Roles is processed.

key_concepts.pro_tip: Run dry plan configurations using --check option to verify effects before provisioning targets.
key_concepts.best_practices: Version control your playbooks and store credentials using encrypted Ansible Vault.
key_concepts.common_mistakes: Forgetting YAML syntax spaces indentation rules causing invalid files errors.
key_concepts.real_world_usage: IT operations teams launch thousands of web nodes in minutes using roles.
key_concepts.summary: Roles configuration forms the building block of config management.

interactive_examples.scenario: Review local variables settings in workspace.

steps.explanation: Ensure you are in the correct home directory.

interactive_examples.solution: Verify tasks lists indentations and paths.

lessons.title: 1. Create web server role directory
lessons.definition: Dividing complex playbook settings into clean folder pathways to allow consistent task sourcing.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Create web server role directory is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Initialize 'roles/web/tasks/main.yml' defining default web setup tasks.
lessons.example:
mkdir -p roles/web/tasks && echo -e '---
- name: Configure Web
  debug:
    msg: "Web role task"' > roles/web/tasks/main.yml
lessons.hint: Check spelling and spacings of your commands carefully.
lessons.solution:
mkdir -p roles/web/tasks && echo -e '---
- name: Configure Web
  debug:
    msg: "Web role task"' > roles/web/tasks/main.yml

lessons.title: 2. Display system diagnostics
lessons.definition: Dividing complex playbook settings into clean folder pathways to allow consistent task sourcing.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Display system diagnostics is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.hint: Confirm you are in the workspace folder.

lessons.title: 3. List directory contents
lessons.definition: Dividing complex playbook settings into clean folder pathways to allow consistent task sourcing.
lessons.explanation: Understanding List directory contents is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Confirm created hosts, templates, or playbooks configurations.
lessons.hint: Run files list to verify existence.

lessons.title: 4. Verify file content displays
lessons.definition: Dividing complex playbook settings into clean folder pathways to allow consistent task sourcing.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Verify file content displays is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Check the configured playbook.yml file content details.
lessons.hint: Verify the playbook or inventory target configs are correctly saved.

lessons.title: 5. Display Ansible module documentation
lessons.definition: Dividing complex playbook settings into clean folder pathways to allow consistent task sourcing.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Display Ansible module documentation is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Retrieve description properties for module configurations.

lessons.title: 6. Query inventory configuration
lessons.definition: Dividing complex playbook settings into clean folder pathways to allow consistent task sourcing.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Query inventory configuration is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Check list outcomes of configured target nodes.
lessons.hint: Ensure hosts file has been defined first.

lessons.title: 7. Dry run playbook test
lessons.definition: Dividing complex playbook settings into clean folder pathways to allow consistent task sourcing.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Dry run playbook test is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.example: ansible-playbook -i hosts playbook.yml --syntax-check || echo 'No playbook yet'
lessons.hint: Confirm the playbook.yml file has been written.
lessons.solution: ansible-playbook -i hosts playbook.yml --syntax-check || echo 'No playbook yet'

lessons.title: 8. Mini Challenge: Execute role import play
lessons.definition: Dividing complex playbook settings into clean folder pathways to allow consistent task sourcing.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Mini Challenge: Execute role import play is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Import your newly configured web role under playbook.yml lists and run execution.
lessons.example:
echo -e '---
- name: Role Play
  hosts: all
  roles:
    - web' > playbook.yml && ansible-playbook -i hosts playbook.yml
lessons.hint: Complete the mini challenge criteria to validate lesson progress.
lessons.solution:
echo -e '---
- name: Role Play
  hosts: all
  roles:
    - web' > playbook.yml && ansible-playbook -i hosts playbook.yml
